title: [codereview] Zephyr parser fallback duplicates file open for legacy parse
description: scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:178 - fallback with open() after telemetry consumes iterator duplicates I/O and risks inconsistent state on large logs. Use single pass combining parsers or lines list with memory guard. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed duplicate file open in Zephyr legacy parser fallback by implementing single-pass _parse_log_stream that combines telemetry JSON and legacy text parsing in one read. Updated all parse_*_logs to use it. Ruff lint passes, script --help works, no iterator consumption issues. Performed 3 codereview passes confirming no remaining P0-P2 issues or duplication. Tests via hetero fleet analysis validated.
